summary: Explosion/area damage in Menace is not a single EventHandler but a composite system using SpawnTileEffectHandler to spawn ApplySkillTileEffects across AOE tiles, which then apply Damage/DamageOverTime effects to entities.

system_architecture.description: Area damage works through a three-layer system: SkillTemplate defines AOE shape/radius, SpawnTileEffect creates tile-based effects, and ApplySkillTileEffect applies damage skills to entities on affected tiles.

components.name: SpawnTileEffectHandler
components.role: Spawns effects on tiles with probability falloff from center

components.name: ApplySkillTileEffectHandler
components.role: Triggers damage skill when entity enters/occupies affected tile

components.name: DamageHandler
components.role: Calculates and applies instant damage to entity

components.name: DamageOverTimeHandler
components.role: Applies periodic damage with armor-only path option

components.name: ExplosionFatality
components.role: Creates visual gore effects for explosion deaths

fields_analyzed.name: Event
fields_analyzed.description: When to trigger effect: 0=OnUse (immediate), 1=OnEnter, 2=OnLeave, 3=OnRoundStart, etc.

fields_analyzed.name: EffectToSpawn
fields_analyzed.description: Template reference for the tile effect to spawn (usually ApplySkillTileEffect for damage)

fields_analyzed.name: ChanceAtCenter
fields_analyzed.description: Base percentage chance to spawn effect at center tile (100 = guaranteed)

fields_analyzed.name: ChancePerTileFromCenter
fields_analyzed.description: Chance modifier per tile distance from center (negative for falloff, positive for increase)

fields_analyzed.name: DelayWithDistance
fields_analyzed.description: Visual delay multiplier per tile distance, creates ripple effect animation

fields_analyzed.name: HitFirstElementOnly
fields_analyzed.description: If true, only damages first element/squaddie instead of distributing

fields_analyzed.name: FlatDamage
fields_analyzed.description: Base flat damage value added to calculated damage

fields_analyzed.name: PercentDamage
fields_analyzed.description: Damage as percentage of target's max HP (0.0-1.0)

fields_analyzed.name: FlatDamageFromMaxHP
fields_analyzed.description: Additional flat damage calculated from max HP

fields_analyzed.name: MinDamageFromMaxHP
fields_analyzed.description: Minimum damage floor based on max HP percentage

fields_analyzed.name: PercentDamageFromElementCount
fields_analyzed.description: Damage scaling multiplier per element in target squad

fields_analyzed.name: MinDamageFromElementCount
fields_analyzed.description: Minimum damage floor from element count calculation

fields_analyzed.name: ArmorDamageOnly
fields_analyzed.description: If true in DOT context, only damages armor durability not HP

fields_analyzed.name: ArmorDmgFlat
fields_analyzed.description: Flat armor durability damage value

fields_analyzed.name: ArmorDmgPctCurrent
fields_analyzed.description: Armor damage as percentage of current armor durability

fields_analyzed.name: FatalityType
fields_analyzed.description: Death animation type: 0=none, 1=normal, 2=explosion (triggers ExplosionFatality)

fields_analyzed.name: ArmorPenetration
fields_analyzed.description: Armor penetration value subtracted from target armor for penetration roll

fields_analyzed.name: ArmorDmgPctFromElementCount
fields_analyzed.description: Armor damage scaling per element count

fields_analyzed.name: ElementHitMinIndex
fields_analyzed.description: Minimum element index to target when distributing damage

fields_analyzed.name: CanCrit
fields_analyzed.description: Whether this damage can critically hit

fields_analyzed.name: AoeShape
fields_analyzed.description: 2D boolean array defining custom AOE shape pattern

fields_analyzed.name: UseCustomAoEShape
fields_analyzed.description: If true, uses CustomAoEShapeObject instead of AoeShape array

fields_analyzed.name: CustomAoEShapeObject
fields_analyzed.description: Custom AOE shape implementation for dynamic shapes

fields_analyzed.name: HasAoe
fields_analyzed.description: Non-zero if skill has AOE component (used as flag)

fields_analyzed.name: AoeFilter
fields_analyzed.description: Optional filter to exclude tiles from AOE (e.g., line of sight check)

fields_analyzed.name: SkillTemplate
fields_analyzed.description: Template for creating the skill instance that applies damage

fields_analyzed.name: RemoveOnTrigger
fields_analyzed.description: If true, tile effect is removed after skill triggers once

fields_analyzed.name: Condition
fields_analyzed.description: Optional condition checked before applying skill to target

fields_analyzed.name: FatalityType
fields_analyzed.description: Death animation type passed from Damage effect

fields_analyzed.name: ElementHitMinIndex
fields_analyzed.description: First element index to damage

fields_analyzed.name: HitDirection
fields_analyzed.description: Direction damage came from (for armor facing)

fields_analyzed.name: Damage
fields_analyzed.description: Final calculated damage amount to apply

fields_analyzed.name: ArmorDmgFlat
fields_analyzed.description: Flat armor durability damage

fields_analyzed.name: ArmorDmgPct
fields_analyzed.description: Percentage armor durability damage

fields_analyzed.name: HitCount
fields_analyzed.description: Number of damage instances (default 1)

fields_analyzed.name: ArmorPenetration
fields_analyzed.description: Armor penetration value for penetration rolls

fields_analyzed.name: CanCrit
fields_analyzed.description: Critical hit enabled flag (default true)

key_discoveries.description: Area damage is not a single handler but a composition of SpawnTileEffect -> ApplySkillTileEffect -> Damage/DamageOverTime handlers working together.
SpawnTileEffectHandler uses ChanceAtCenter + distance * ChancePerTileFromCenter formula for probability falloff from explosion center.
DelayWithDistance field creates ripple animation by delaying effect spawn based on distance: delay = distance * DelayWithDistance * 1.5
When FatalityType is 2, death triggers ExplosionFatality$$Execute which spawns 14 gore prefabs with physics-based trajectories.
Penetration chance = 100 - (ArmorValue - ArmorPenetration) * 3, minimum 0%. Each hit rolls independently.
DamageOverTimeHandler has special path when ArmorDamageOnly=true that only damages armor durability without HP damage.
Final damage is: ceil(MaxHP * PercentDamage) + FlatDamage, with minimum of 1 damage.
Both damage and armor damage can scale based on target's element count (squad size) using PercentDamageFromElementCount fields.
AOE can use either a 2D boolean array (AoeShape) or implement ICustomAoEShape interface for dynamic shape calculation.
SkillTemplate offset 0xF1 enables LOS checking for AOE tiles - tiles without line of sight from source are excluded.

armor_durability_damage.cap: Cannot exceed CurrentArmor / ElementCount per hit

related_functions_documented.name: DamageHandler$$ApplyDamage
related_functions_documented.purpose: Main damage application with all field offsets documented

related_functions_documented.name: SpawnTileEffectHandler$$Apply_WithProbability
related_functions_documented.purpose: Core tile effect spawning with probability system

related_functions_documented.name: Entity$$OnDamageReceived
related_functions_documented.purpose: Core damage processing and armor/HP application
